'''âs-ng-zh''' ('''kasangazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:needle|needle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:needle|needle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kasangazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisangazh|thisangazh]] || [[word:jisangazh|jisangazh]] || [[word:shisangazh|shisangazh]] || [[word:kisangazh|kisangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusangazh|thuthusangazh]] || [[word:jujusangazh|jujusangazh]] || [[word:shushusangazh|shushusangazh]] || [[word:kukusangazh|kukusangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusangazh|thusangazh]] || [[word:jusangazh|jusangazh]] || [[word:shusangazh|shusangazh]] || [[word:kusangazh|kusangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusangazh|thusangazh]] || [[word:jusangazh|jusangazh]] || [[word:shusangazh|shusangazh]] || [[word:kusangazh|kusangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesangazh|thesangazh]] || [[word:jesangazh|jesangazh]] || [[word:shesangazh|shesangazh]] || [[word:kesangazh|kesangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosangazh|thothosangazh]] || [[word:jojosangazh|jojosangazh]] || [[word:shoshosangazh|shoshosangazh]] || [[word:kokosangazh|kokosangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosangazh|thosangazh]] || [[word:josangazh|josangazh]] || [[word:shosangazh|shosangazh]] || [[word:kosangazh|kosangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosangazh|thosangazh]] || [[word:josangazh|josangazh]] || [[word:shosangazh|shosangazh]] || [[word:kosangazh|kosangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsangazh|thĂŠsangazh]] || [[word:jĂŠsangazh|jĂŠsangazh]] || [[word:shĂŠsangazh|shĂŠsangazh]] || [[word:kĂŠsangazh|kĂŠsangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasangazh|thathasangazh]] || [[word:jajasangazh|jajasangazh]] || [[word:shashasangazh|shashasangazh]] || [[word:kakasangazh|kakasangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasangazh|thasangazh]] || [[word:jasangazh|jasangazh]] || [[word:shasangazh|shasangazh]] || [[word:kasangazh|kasangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasangazh|thasangazh]] || [[word:jasangazh|jasangazh]] || [[word:shasangazh|shasangazh]] || [[word:kasangazh|kasangazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasangazh|shasangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasangazh|goshasangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasangazh|gokishasangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasangazhnĂŒ|shasangazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasangazhnknĂŒ|goshasangazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazhnĂŒ|gokishasangazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasangazhshĂ«|shasangazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkshĂ«|goshasangazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasangazhshĂ«|gokishasangazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazhro|shasangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkro|goshasangazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazhro|gokishasangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazhmu|shasangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkmu|goshasangazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazhmu|gokishasangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasangazhsher|shasangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasangazhnksher|goshasangazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasangazhsher|gokishasangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasangazhng|shasangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkng|goshasangazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasangazhng|gokishasangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasangazhya|shasangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkya|goshasangazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasangazhya|gokishasangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasangazhyam|shasangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkyam|goshasangazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasangazhyam|gokishasangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangazhnĂŒshĂ«|shasangazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasangazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasangazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazhnĂŒro|shasangazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangazhnknĂŒro|goshasangazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazhnĂŒro|gokishasangazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazhnĂŒmu|shasangazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangazhnknĂŒmu|goshasangazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazhnĂŒmu|gokishasangazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shasangazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasangazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasangazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazhshĂ«ro|shasangazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkshĂ«ro|goshasangazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazhshĂ«ro|gokishasangazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazhshĂ«mu|shasangazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkshĂ«mu|goshasangazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazhshĂ«mu|gokishasangazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazhronĂŒ|shasangazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkronĂŒ|goshasangazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazhronĂŒ|gokishasangazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangazhroshĂ«|shasangazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkroshĂ«|goshasangazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangazhroshĂ«|gokishasangazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasangazhromu|shasangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkromu|goshasangazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasangazhromu|gokishasangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasangazhmunĂŒ|shasangazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkmunĂŒ|goshasangazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasangazhmunĂŒ|gokishasangazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasangazhmushĂ«|shasangazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkmushĂ«|goshasangazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasangazhmushĂ«|gokishasangazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasangazhmuro|shasangazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangazhnkmuro|goshasangazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasangazhmuro|gokishasangazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
